title: trilisa carnosa
intro: Trilisa carnosa, also known as the yellow gentian, is a flowering plant species native to India and Southeast Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic activities. The health benefits of Trilisa carnosa include its ability to treat fever, digestive issues, and respiratory problems, as well as its use as an antiseptic to prevent infection and promote wound healing. Trilisa carnosa is often prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and its extracts are also used in traditional medicine to support overall health and well-being.
